message:
release: unblock ftui-layout publish from dev-dependency cycle

Change ftui-layout's dev-dependency constraint on ftui-harness from 0.2.1 to 0.2.0 while keeping the local path dependency. This preserves local workspace resolution (0.2.1 satisfies ^0.2.0) and removes the crates.io publish deadlock where layout required a not-yet-published harness 0.2.1.
